cases.prompt: Unimproved land inside Mount Vernon city limits.
action_plan: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.next_action: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.generated_sql:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT ps.parcel_number, ps.land_use, ps.acres, ps.assessed_value, ps.improvement_building_count, ps.city_name
  FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search.parquet') ps
  WHERE TRY_CAST(NULLIF(regexp_extract(COALESCE(ps.land_use, ''), '^\((\d+)\)', 1), '') AS INTEGER) = 911
    AND lower(ps.city_name) = 'mount vernon'
    AND COALESCE(ps.improvement_building_count, 0) = 0
    AND ps.acres > 0
)
SELECT parcel_number, land_use, acres, assessed_value, improvement_building_count, city_name
FROM base
ORDER BY acres DESC
cases.title: Unimproved Land Inside Mount Vernon City Limits
cases.criteria_summary: Parcels with unimproved land use code 911 (unimproved land inside city) located inside Mount Vernon city limits, excluding parcels with improvements or residential dwelling evidence.

cases.prompt: Private bare recreation lots with valid map geometry, excluding public parks, schools, cemeteries, churches, moorage, and condos.
action_plan: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.next_action: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.generated_sql:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    ps.parcel_number,
    ps.land_use,
    ps.acres,
    ps.assessed_value,
    ps.has_geometry,
    COALESCE(ps.improvement_building_count, 0) AS improvement_building_count
  FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search.parquet') AS ps
  WHERE ps.has_geometry = TRUE
    AND COALESCE(ps.acres, 0) > 0
    AND COALESCE(ps.improvement_building_count, 0) = 0
),
excluded_land_use_codes AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT TRIM(regexp_extract(land_use, '^\((\d+)\)', 1)) AS code
  FROM base
  WHERE land_use IS NOT NULL
),
filtered AS (
  SELECT
    parcel_number,
    land_use,
    acres,
    assessed_value,
    improvement_building_count
  FROM base
  WHERE
    -- Exclude public parks, schools, cemeteries, churches, moorage, condos by land use code or keywords
    NOT (
      TRY_CAST(NULLIF(regexp_extract(COALESCE(land_use, ''), '^\((\d+)\)', 1), '') AS INTEGER) IN (140, 710, 711, 712, 713, 714, 715, 720, 730, 740, 750, 760, 770, 780, 790, 910, 911, 912, 970) -- condos, unimproved land codes, recreation, open space
      OR lower(land_use) LIKE '%park%'
      OR lower(land_use) LIKE '%school%'
      OR lower(land_use) LIKE '%cemetery%'
      OR lower(land_use) LIKE '%church%'
      OR lower(land_use) LIKE '%moorage%'
      OR lower(land_use) LIKE '%public%'
      OR lower(land_use) LIKE '%common area%'
    )
)
SELECT
  parcel_number,
  land_use,
  acres,
  assessed_value,
  improvement_building_count
FROM filtered
ORDER BY acres DESC
cases.title: Private Bare Recreation Lots with Valid Geometry Excluding Public and Institutional Uses
cases.criteria_summary: Select parcels that are private bare or recreation land with valid map geometry, excluding parcels used as public parks, schools, cemeteries, churches, moorage, and condominiums. Parcels must have no buildings or improvements and must not be public or institutional land use types.

action_plan: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.

cases.generated_sql:

FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search.parquet') AS ps

cases.prompt: Sedro-Woolley commercial redevelopment parcels, not single family homes.
action_plan: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.next_action: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT ps.parcel_number, ps.land_use, ps.acres, ps.assessed_value
FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search.parquet') AS ps
WHERE (lower(ps.city_name) = 'sedro-woolley' OR lower(ps.situs_city_state_zip) LIKE '%sedro-woolley%')
  AND TRY_CAST(NULLIF(regexp_extract(COALESCE(ps.land_use, ''), '^\((\d+)', 1), '') AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 500 AND 699
  AND NOT (TRY_CAST(NULLIF(regexp_extract(COALESCE(ps.land_use, ''), '^\((\d+)', 1), '') AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 110 AND 199)
  AND COALESCE(ps.improvement_building_count, 0) > 0
cases.title: Sedro-Woolley Commercial Redevelopment Parcels Excluding Single Family Homes
cases.criteria_summary: Parcels located in Sedro-Woolley with land use codes starting with 5 or 6 (commercial/industrial/service related), excluding single family homes and mobile homes (land use codes starting with 1 or 18x).
